title: lastrea variabilis
intro: Lastrea variabilis, also known as the Variable Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lastrea variabilis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Lastrea variabilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried plant parts in hot water or a solvent.
